name: Kung Fu Beats: Fantasy Music Dojo

reviews.review_description:
This was priced at around £2 when I purchased it, and for that lowly price, I definitely feel like I'm getting my money's worth.  Pick up your Monkey-King staff and smash balls that fly at you as you stand aloft a floating platform in the sky, while Dragons circle.  

It's a fun little game, and a worthy addition to every VR-Ninjas arsenal.  That said, I feel like this has almost everything it needs to be considerably better than it currently is - possibly even great.  I'd love to see some Les Mills Body Combat (or any boxing type game) with glowing orbs coming towards you from the front in a set rhythm pattern routines (rather than, or in addition to, the current random firing of balls at you).  As it stands it's a little clumsy to play, but with sum fun flow workouts, this could be epic...
I've tried this game — super fun! Swinging that stick, and crushing balls is oddly addictive. Visually stunning and seriously engaging. Definitely worth a play!

Love the style and music.
Please add double swords to the game
